user_system_path: Seam #407 — the generator attaches its own work (deterministic slice). Follow-on to #404: when an approved write_document is delivered, the brain's own drafted content also rides as a real file attachment (<title>.md), not just inline HTML — the first real population of #404's attachment rails. Placed at the delivery boundary (executeAction), NOT inside the 11.8k-line generator LLM flow: same user outcome, no new model call, no breakage risk. New deriveDocumentAttachment + attachmentFilenameFromTitle in lib/email/attachments.ts; wired into the write_document delivery email via the existing Resend attachment support. Live delivery stays behind ALLOW_APPROVAL_EMAIL_SEND. Constraint: NO paid API calls to test — Resend mocked at the boundary.
allowed_files_raw: Seam #407: a deterministic delivery-boundary transform — deriveDocumentAttachment in lib/email/attachments.ts and one call site in executeAction's write_document delivery email, plus tests + control-plane.
forbidden_files_raw: No generator LLM flow changes, no schema (supabase/**), no dependency changes (package.json / lock).
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run build && npm run lint
required_browser_proof: Harness-proven (lib/email + lib/conviction suites, incl. new deriveDocumentAttachment/filename tests + updated write_document delivery test). Live owner validation: approve a write_document with ALLOW_APPROVAL_EMAIL_SEND=true and confirm the delivery email arrives with the <title>.md file attached — BLOCKED_WITH_EXACT_RECEIPT until then.
acceptance_condition: An approved write_document delivery email carries the document's own content as a real <title>.md attachment (derived deterministically, no new model call), bounded by the existing attachment caps; empty content attaches nothing; no generator/schema/dependency changes; gate:continuity + build + lint green.
anti_regression_checks: no new LLM/model call — attachment is repackaged from the brain's own drafted content
stop_condition: Stop when the draft PR for #407 is open with CI green, or BLOCKED_WITH_EXACT_RECEIPT on the owner-side live delivery validation.
next_command: Owner: approve a write_document with ALLOW_APPROVAL_EMAIL_SEND=true and confirm the delivery email arrives with the <title>.md file attached. Then: optionally extend to send_message companion documents (paid generator build) once approved with a cost ceiling.
